ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gpio_pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPIO pin */,
  "ip" TEXT /* IP address or identifier of the microcontroller */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPIO pin (e.g., PA0-WKUP) */,
  "signal" TEXT /* Signal type connected to the GPIO pin (e.g., TIM2_CH1) */,
  "gpio_mode" TEXT /* Operating mode of the GPIO pin (e.g., Alternate Function Push Pull) */,
  "pull_up_pull_down" TEXT /* Configuration of pull-up or pull-down resistors */,
  "max_speed" TEXT /* Maximum operating speed of the GPIO pin */,
  "user_label" TEXT /* Custom label assigned by the user for easy reference */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the pin is used */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the pin configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pins_max_speed FOREIGN KEY ("max_speed") REFERENCES speeds ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pins_pull_up_pull_down FOREIGN KEY ("pull_up_pull_down") REFERENCES pull_up_pull_downs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pins_ip FOREIGN KEY ("ip") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pins_gpio_mode FOREIGN KEY ("gpio_mode") REFERENCES gpio_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpio_pins_signal FOREIGN KEY ("signal") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller */,
  "mc_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the microcontroller */,
  "ip" TEXT /* IP address or identifier of the microcontroller */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the microcontroller */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the microcontroller */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet of the microcontroller */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Total number of GPIO pins on the microcontroller */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the microcontroller entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the microcontroller entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the microcontroller entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the microcontroller entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal (e.g., TIM2_CH1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal */,
  "compatible_pins" TEXT /* List of GPIO pins that can be used with this signal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the signal entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the signal entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpio_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPIO mode (e.g., Alternate Function Push Pull) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "compatible_signals" TEXT /* List of signals that can be used with this mode */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mode entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mode entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the mode entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the mode entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_up_pull_downs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the pull-up/pull-down configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "compatible_modes" TEXT /* List of GPIO modes that can be used with this configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speeds" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed */,
  "speed_name" TEXT /* Name of the maximum speed (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the speed */,
  "compatible_modes" TEXT /* List of GPIO modes that can be used with this speed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the speed entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the speed entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the speed entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the speed entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPIO pin used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the pin is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., Development, Testing, Production) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the usage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the usage */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the usage was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_usage_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES gpio_pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, team lead, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPIO pin */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the label was assigned */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the label */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the label */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the label was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_labels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_labels_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES gpio_pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_monitoring" (
  "monitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring event */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPIO pin being monitored */,
  "signal_value" TEXT /* Value of the signal at the time of monitoring */,
  "monitor_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was monitored */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the monitoring event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the monitoring event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_monitoring_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES gpio_pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPIO pin being tested */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., Functional, Performance) */,
  "test_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES gpio_pins ("pin_id")
)
